member.name: T:CustomRoyaltyFee
member.summary: Custom royalty fee utility class. See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:CustomRoyaltyFee.FromProtobuf(Proto.RoyaltyFee)
member.summary: Create a custom royalty fee from a royalty fee protobuf.

member.name: M:CustomRoyaltyFee.DeepCloneSubclass
member.summary: The fallback fee is a fixed fee that is charged to the NFT receiver when there is no fungible value exchanged with the sender of the NFT.

member.name: M:CustomRoyaltyFee.ToRoyaltyFeeProtobuf
member.summary: Convert the royalty fee object to a protobuf.
